creator: nemysis@gmx.ch
text:
Wizznic is an implementation of Puzznic for Gp2X Wiz, Linux and Windows.
It is made very easy for non-programmers to contribute Levels/Graphics
and sounds.

WWW: http://dustedgames.blogspot.com/p/wizznic.html
WWW: http://sourceforge.net/projects/wizznic/

Generated and tested manually, tested with port test, sent with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: new)

How-To-Repeat: 
portlint -A
looks fine.

port test: clean

Can't give build log, because RedPorts not works at the time.

Remark:
I have added the line Not sure if is used, works to without, but just in case...
USE_GMAKE=	yes
